options.content:
## Agora — paper trading
**Virtual money only** (eToro demo, write-locked to demo by schema + credentials). Every bet is a committed prediction, graded mechanically at its horizon. The index line is the bar to beat — amounts in $ (1.234,56). Updates nightly at 22:37.

panels.title: 🏁 The race — Agora NAV vs the index  ($)
panels.description: Benchmark: VWRD.L (USD class of the VWRL all-world fund), normalized to the same start. Distributing class understates the index by ~2%/yr of dividends — a bias IN THE AGENT'S FAVOR until the total-return adjustment lands.

targets.rawSql: SELECT nav_date AS time, nav_usd AS 'Agora NAV', benchmark_nav AS 'Index (VWRD)' FROM finops_agora.nav_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(nav_date) ORDER BY nav_date

panels.title: 🏁 Agent vs index — today  ($)

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT('$ ', FORMAT(nav_usd - benchmark_nav, 2, 'de_DE')) AS v FROM finops_agora.nav_daily ORDER BY nav_date DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Positive = the agent is ahead of just-buying-the-index. The only score that matters.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT('$ ', FORMAT(nav_usd, 2, 'de_DE')) AS v FROM finops_agora.nav_daily ORDER BY nav_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CONCAT('$ ', FORMAT(cash_usd, 2, 'de_DE')) AS v FROM finops_agora.nav_daily ORDER BY nav_date DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: 🎯 Open bets — committed predictions awaiting their verdict

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.strategy_family AS `Methodology`, i.symbol AS `Symbol`, p.direction AS `Direction`, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(p.created_at, INTERVAL p.horizon_days DAY), '%d-%m-%Y') AS `Verdict due`, CONCAT(FORMAT(p.target_low_pct,1,'de_DE'), '% – ', FORMAT(p.target_high_pct,1,'de_DE'), '%') AS `Target return`, CONCAT(FORMAT(p.max_adverse_pct,1,'de_DE'), '%') AS `Dead beyond`, FORMAT(p.confidence,2,'de_DE') AS `Confidence`, p.catalyst AS `Catalyst` FROM finops_agora.predictions p JOIN finops_agora.instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id LEFT JOIN finops_agora.verdicts v ON v.plan_hash = p.plan_hash WHERE v.plan_hash IS NULL ORDER BY DATE_ADD(p.created_at, INTERVAL p.horizon_days DAY), p.strategy_family LIMIT 40

panels.description: Every row is a falsifiable promise with a hash. Nothing here is tradeable advice; shorts/longs are shadow bets graded against real prices.

panels.title: 🏆 Methodology scoreboard — who earns their keep (latest scoring)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ss.family AS `Methodology`, COALESCE(st.status,'⚠ undeclared') AS `Status`, ss.n_verdicted AS `Graded`, CONCAT(ss.n_match,' / ',ss.n_partial,' / ',ss.n_deviation) AS `match / partial / deviation`, CONCAT(FORMAT(ss.win_rate*100,1,'de_DE'),'%') AS `Win rate`, CONCAT(FORMAT(ss.avg_excess_pct,2,'de_DE'),' pp') AS `Excess vs index`, FORMAT(ss.avg_brier,3,'de_DE') AS `Brier`, FORMAT(ss.calibration_gap,3,'de_DE') AS `Overconfidence` FROM finops_agora.strategy_scores ss JOIN (SELECT family, MAX(score_date) d FROM finops_agora.strategy_scores GROUP BY family) m   ON m.family = ss.family AND m.d = ss.score_date LEFT JOIN finops_agora.strategies st ON st.family = ss.family ORDER BY ss.avg_excess_pct DESC

panels.description: Win rate and excess-vs-index are NEVER collapsed into one number (omoikane Article LXXV pattern). Overconfidence = avg confidence minus win rate; positive means the methodology promises more than it delivers. Graduation gates read THIS table (DESIGN.md §9).

panels.title: 📊 Verdicts over time  (match / partial / deviation per day)

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE(evaluated_at) AS time, outcome AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM finops_agora.verdicts WHERE $__timeFilter(evaluated_at) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 🔄 Pipeline health — nightly chain (22:37: sync → graph → verdict → forecasts → scores)

targets.rawSql: SELECT source AS `Stage`, DATE_FORMAT(last_synced_at, '%d-%m %H:%i') AS `Last run`, CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, last_synced_at, NOW()), ' h ago') AS `Age` FROM finops_agora.sync_state ORDER BY source
SELECT CONCAT(COUNT(*), '') AS v FROM finops_agora.predictions p LEFT JOIN finops_agora.verdicts v2 ON v2.plan_hash = p.plan_hash WHERE v2.plan_hash IS NULL

options.content:
### 🧪 Research integrity & risk — the honesty layer
The statistical guards that make a *yes* trustworthy: deflated for luck, tested for overfitting, sized for risk. Full detail in the cockpit → [agora.example.net](https://agora.example.net). These activate as graded verdicts accrue from 16-06-2026 (dashes until then are expected, not failure).

panels.title: 🎯 Road to real money — gate · DSR (luck guard) · fragility (strategy risk)
panels.description: Per-family distance to real money. DSR = probability the family's Sharpe is real GIVEN how many were tried (G2 needs ≥0,95). Fragility = probability it misses its target Sharpe — strategy risk, not portfolio risk. Mirrors the cockpit Road tracker.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.family AS `Methodology`, COALESCE(gs.gate,'G0') AS `Gate`, CONCAT(COALESCE(ss.n_verdicted,0),' / 100') AS `Verdicts → G2`, IFNULL(CONCAT(FORMAT(ss.avg_excess_pct,2,'de_DE'),' pp'),'—') AS `Excess vs index`, IFNULL(FORMAT(ss.dsr,3,'de_DE'),'—') AS `DSR (real?)`, IFNULL(CONCAT(FORMAT(ss.prob_failure*100,0,'de_DE'),'%'),'—') AS `Fragility (P-fail)` FROM finops_agora.strategies s LEFT JOIN finops_agora.graduation_state gs ON gs.family=s.family LEFT JOIN finops_agora.strategy_scores ss ON ss.family=s.family AND ss.score_date=(SELECT MAX(score_date) FROM finops_agora.strategy_scores WHERE family=s.family) WHERE s.status<>'retired' ORDER BY COALESCE(ss.n_verdicted,0) DESC, s.family

panels.title: 🛡 Portfolio risk budget + circuit breaker — the whole-book guard
panels.description: Historical VaR/ES + drawdown over the open book. The breaker halts all actors (maintenance file) on a drawdown or VaR breach.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT(FORMAT(gross_pct,1,'de_DE'),' %') AS `Gross`, CONCAT(FORMAT(net_pct,1,'de_DE'),' %') AS `Net`, CONCAT(FORMAT(var95_pct,2,'de_DE'),' %') AS `1-day VaR 95%`, CONCAT(FORMAT(es95_pct,2,'de_DE'),' %') AS `Expected shortfall`, CONCAT(FORMAT(drawdown_pct,2,'de_DE'),' %') AS `Drawdown`, IF(breaker_armed=1,'🛑 ARMED','✓ disarmed') AS `Circuit breaker` FROM finops_agora.portfolio_risk ORDER BY as_of DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: 🔬 Overfitting guard — purged CV + synthetic backtests
panels.description: IS→OOS Sharpe degradation + PBO (probability of backtest overfitting). PBO>0,50 or OOS≪IS ⇒ the rule was curve-fit, not edge.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE kind WHEN 'cv' THEN 'purged-CV' WHEN 'synth' THEN 'synthetic' ELSE kind END AS `Test`, REPLACE(REPLACE(scenario,'cv:',''),'synth:','') AS `Symbol`, IFNULL(FORMAT(JSON_VALUE(outcome,'$.is_sharpe'),2,'de_DE'),'—') AS `IS Sharpe`, IFNULL(FORMAT(JSON_VALUE(outcome,'$.oos_sharpe'),2,'de_DE'),'—') AS `OOS Sharpe`, IFNULL(FORMAT(JSON_VALUE(outcome,'$.cpcv.median'),2,'de_DE'),'—') AS `CPCV median`, IFNULL(FORMAT(JSON_VALUE(outcome,'$.pbo'),2,'de_DE'),'—') AS `PBO` FROM finops_agora.sim_runs WHERE kind IN ('cv','synth') ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 12

panels.title: 🎚 Optimal trading rules — barriers derived from the process, not curve-fit
panels.description: For mean-reverting names, the Monte-Carlo-optimal (profit-take, stop-loss) in σ-units — derived from a fitted O-U process (López de Prado ch13). Short half-life → small target / wide stop / high Sharpe.

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol AS `Name`, FORMAT(half_life,1,'de_DE') AS `Half-life`, FORMAT(r2,2,'de_DE') AS `R²`, CONCAT(FORMAT(best_pt_sigma,2,'de_DE'),'σ / ',FORMAT(best_sl_sigma,2,'de_DE'),'σ') AS `Target / stop`, FORMAT(best_sharpe,2,'de_DE') AS `MC Sharpe`, CONCAT(FORMAT(pct_pt*100,0,'de_DE'),'%') AS `Take %` FROM finops_agora.otr_grid WHERE eligible=1 ORDER BY best_sharpe DESC LIMIT 12

panels.title: 🧮 Capital allocation across families — the meta-allocator
panels.description: Advisory capital weight per family (softmax of Sharpe×DSR → hierarchical risk parity once return history exists). Equal-weight at cold start. Tilts position sizing; never auto-executes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT family AS `Methodology`, CONCAT(FORMAT(weight*100,1,'de_DE'),' %') AS `Capital weight` FROM finops_agora.family_weights WHERE as_of=(SELECT MAX(as_of) FROM finops_agora.family_weights) ORDER BY weight DESC

panels.title: 🏷 Meta-labeling — the secondary filter model
panels.description: A secondary model that learns P(bet pays off) from commit-time features and shrinks doomed bets. Lift>1 ⇒ filtering beats taking every bet. Dormant until ~30 verdicts.

targets.rawSql: SELECT n_train AS `Training labels`, n_eval AS `OOS graded`, IFNULL(FORMAT(f1,2,'de_DE'),'—') AS `OOS F1`, IFNULL(CONCAT(FORMAT(lift,2,'de_DE'),'×'),'—') AS `Lift vs no-filter`, note AS `Status` FROM finops_agora.meta_label_perf ORDER BY as_of DESC LIMIT 1
